# Ticket: <title>

> Owner: **Project Manager** (creates) → assigned to an engineer. In practice this becomes a
> **GitHub Issue** in the project repo; this template defines the issue body.

- **Type:** feat / fix / chore / test / docs
- **Phase:** build
- **Assignee role:** `role:<senior-dev|junior-dev|…>`
- **Depends on:** #<issue> (if any)
- **Traces to:** PRD R<n> / ADR-<nnnn>

## Description
What needs doing and why, with enough context for the assignee to act without guessing.

## Scope
- **In:** …
- **Out:** … *(prevents scope creep — especially important for Junior Engineer tickets)*

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] … *(must be checkable; mirrors the relevant PRD acceptance criteria)*

## Notes
Links, gotchas, references.
